name: Chesterfield State Bank
description_short: Chesterfield State Bank is an FDIC-insured community bank in Illinois offering online banking, personal and business accounts, and financial calculators with over 125 years of service.
description_long: Chesterfield State Bank has operated as a community financial institution for over 125 years, serving the Chesterfield, Illinois area from its Main Street location. The bank positions itself as combining modern banking technology with traditional personalized service, emphasizing accessibility and customer-focused financial solutions. The bank is actively modernizing its digital infrastructure, with a newly redesigned website and online banking services in development. As an FDIC-insured institution, it offers the security and regulatory protections standard to traditional banks. The bank's long tenure in the community and emphasis on innovation suggests stability and commitment to local service. However, the website reveals that core digital services like online banking and enrollment remain incomplete and forthcoming rather than currently operational. This presents a significant limitation for customers seeking immediate access to modern banking conveniences. The bank appears to be in transition toward enhanced digital offerings but has not yet fully deployed them. For customers prioritizing established local relationships and willing to work through a transition period, this bank may appeal, but those requiring full-featured online banking today should look elsewhere.
pros: Over 125 years of operating history and community presence in Chesterfield, Illinois
FDIC-insured deposits providing federal protection up to standard limits
Offers both personal and business banking services
New website redesign with modern interface and improved accessibility features
Financial calculators available to help customers with financial planning
Accessible banking platform with AudioEye optimization for users with disabilities
Local, in-person banking at 25 S Main Street with direct phone access (618) 753-3181
cons: Online banking and enrollment remain 'Coming Soon' and are not yet operational
Mobile app download mentioned but not yet fully available
Limited information on the website about specific loan products, rates, or account types
Appears to be mid-transition technologically, which may cause service delays
No details provided about customer service hours, account fees, or competitive rates
best_for: Local Chesterfield, Illinois residents who prefer in-person banking relationships
Small business owners seeking community bank support and local decision-making
Customers who value long-established institutions with deep local roots
People willing to wait for online banking features to launch in the coming months
diagnosis: Chesterfield State Bank is best for established community members in the Chesterfield area seeking traditional banking with a local touch and long institutional history. The main caveat is that online banking and mobile services are not yet fully operational, making this bank less suitable for customers requiring immediate access to comprehensive digital banking tools.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
